overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban street in Night City. The player character walks past pedestrians, futuristic storefronts, and massive digital billboards in a rainy, atmospheric cyberpunk environment with wet pavement reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with security fencing and neon billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a metal security fence, approaching pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: person in blue shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk
person in dark clothing walking in the same direction

entered.detail: tall black metal security fence with vertical bars running along the sidewalk
large illuminated billboard atop a building displaying 24/7 SUPER in bright neon colors
tall street lamp casting warm light on the wet pavement
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky along the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a nighttime urban sidewalk bordered by a metal security fence on the left. The camera walks forward toward a massive 24/7 Super billboard glowing in the distance, passing pedestrians walking ahead. Palm trees line the right side of the street and the wet concrete reflects the neon lights.

events.description: passing the green-lit Databank terminal structure with glowing screens on the left
approaching the street intersection with visible vehicle headlights ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the illuminated Databank terminal, approaching the street intersection

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress walking ahead toward the intersection
car with headlights on approaching the intersection

entered.detail: futuristic green-lit terminal structure with glowing interface screens
wide street intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: The camera passes a futuristic Databank terminal with green glowing screens on the left while continuing toward a street intersection. The 24/7 Super billboard shifts to the left as the camera advances. A woman in a red dress walks ahead, and vehicle headlights approach from the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide intersection with multiple digital billboards

events.description: stepping off the sidewalk and entering the wide wet asphalt street intersection
large cylindrical digital billboard structure becomes visible on the left side

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide wet street intersection surrounded by towering digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: dark colored car driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: wide wet asphalt street reflecting the neon lights and street lamps
cluster of three massive vertical digital billboards displaying advertisements
large cylindrical structure wrapped with multiple digital screens showing rotating ads
elevated highway overpass ramp with street lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide street intersection with wet asphalt reflecting the surrounding neon lights. The camera crosses the open area toward a large cylindrical billboard structure that comes into view on the left. Massive digital billboards tower on the right while a car passes through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk with cylindrical billboard and residential buildings

events.description: moving from open intersection back to enclosed sidewalk next to the cylindrical billboard

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrower sidewalk past the cylindrical billboard structure and low-rise buildings

entered.detail: metal fence with horizontal rails running along the sidewalk edge
low-rise traditional building with porch and external air conditioning units

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to a narrower sidewalk bordered by a metal railing fence, passing close to the cylindrical billboard structure on the left. Traditional residential buildings with porches line the path, and the wet pavement continues to reflect the ambient neon light from distant signs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a neon-drenched urban corridor that expands into a wide intersection before narrowing back into a residential street. It begins on a wet sidewalk bordered by a metal security fence, moving past palm trees and pedestrians toward a glowing 24/7 Super billboard. As the camera advances, it passes a green-lit Databank terminal and a woman in a red dress, while the billboard shifts to the left and vehicle headlights approach from the right. The scene then opens into a wide street intersection of reflective asphalt, crossing toward a massive cylindrical billboard structure as towering digital displays dominate the right side of the frame. Finally, the camera returns to a narrower path along a metal railing, passing the cylindrical structure to move alongside traditional residential porches under the ambient glow of distant neon signs.
